channel.title: Liferay, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Liferay, Inc. (liferay).

item.title: CVE-2025-62275 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Blogs in Liferay Portal 7.4.0 through 7.4.3.111, and older unsupported versions, and Liferay DXP 2023.Q4.0 through 2023.Q4.10, 2023.Q3.1 through 2023.Q3.10, 7.4 GA through update 92, and older unsupported versions does not check permission of images…
